name: Nusantara Visual and Audio QA
visual_checks: Bali Nusantara color tone appears warm and consistent
ornament line appears without disturbing text readability
buttons remain large enough for panic or low-focus user
audio_checks: Audio starts after tap if browser blocks autoplay
Audio is soft and not distracting
Audio button does not cover Bantuan button or bottom navigation
fix_rules: If music button overlaps Bantuan, move Musik to top-left or raise bottom offset
If audio feels too loud, lower master gain in assets/nusantara-audio.js
If page feels too heavy, disable iframe theme injection for non-core modules
If text contrast is weak, darken brown text or lighten card background
